text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Woiya happy! Haiya lucky!
Thank you, Shiraoki!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Woiya happyyy!☆ Haiya luckyyy!☆
Thank you, Shiraokiii!☆

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, this Japanese spell is very difficult!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
By the way, what do these words
mean anyway?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Meaning?! Well, let me rephrase it a bit…

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yes to happy clappies! No more worries, go!
All praise to the great Shiraoki! Thank you!
